verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus, my endless love You are so beautiful Your love has saved me With all I am I will honor you You gave it all for me Now I'm Yours So I'm here to say that

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'm living my life for the one above the heavens The one whose Son was crucified for me I'm living my Life for the Son who bled to save us I want the world to see this love in me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus, strength of my heart You are so beautiful Your passion's my safety In gentleness You have healed my heart And captured me with Your love Now I'm Yours So I'm here to say that

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I'll live my life in love with You You're all I really want in this world

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I'll live my live in love with you You're all I really want in this world I'll live my life in love with you You're all I really want in this world
